description_long: This is a modern, cubic house with two above-ground stories and a flat roof, featuring large floor-to-ceiling windows on the main facade. The house includes a driveway with two parked cars, a spacious wooden deck, and a rectangular swimming pool with poolside lounge chairs and umbrellas. The exterior is predominantly white with black window frames, giving it a sleek, minimalist appearance. The rear and side facades also have large windows, providing ample natural light to the interior. The main entryway is set beneath a large window, with a simple, flush door and no porch or overhang. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a strong connection between indoor and outdoor living areas.
description: A modern, two-story white house with large windows, a flat roof, a driveway, and a poolside deck. The design is minimalist with open, airy spaces and sleek black accents.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway with two cars, the main entryway, and tall windows.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the wooden deck, pool, lounge chairs, and umbrellas, with large windows visible.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the pool, deck, and extensive glass facade, with open access to the outdoor area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the deck, pool, and additional windows, as well as the driveway and cars.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Simple flush door beneath a large window, no porch or overhang, minimalistic and unadorned
